prerequisites: A running Dolibarr ERP/CRM instance reachable over HTTP(S), with its base URL available for the `my_dolibarr_domain_url` config field.
The 'API REST' module enabled in Dolibarr under Setup > Modules/Applications, which turns the instance into a REST web services server.
A Dolibarr user account with an API key generated (the 'Key for API' field on the user record), used as the `api_key` secret.
A `start_date` value to bound the initial data sync.

authMethods.name: API Key (DOLAPIKEY)
authMethods.summary: Dolibarr authenticates REST API requests with a per-user API key sent in the `DOLAPIKEY` HTTP header. Generate the key in the 'Key for API' field on the user's record in Dolibarr, then supply it as the connector's `api_key` secret. The connector targets the instance at `my_dolibarr_domain_url`, whose REST endpoints live under `/api/index.php`.

setupSteps.title: Enable the REST API module
setupSteps.body: Log in to Dolibarr as an administrator and go to Setup > Modules/Applications. Activate the 'API REST' module. Once enabled, the instance exposes REST endpoints under `/api/index.php` (for example `http://<your-server>/api/index.php/invoices`).

setupSteps.title: Generate the user API key
setupSteps.body: Open the Dolibarr user record that the connector will authenticate as. In the user's card, locate the 'Key for API' field and generate or set an API key. This value is sent as the `DOLAPIKEY` header on every request.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set `my_dolibarr_domain_url` to your Dolibarr instance base URL (the host serving `/api/index.php`). Paste the generated key into the `api_key` secret field. Set `start_date` to the earliest date from which records should be synced.

sources.title: Dolibarr Wiki - Module Web Services API REST (developer)
